title: agrostis inaequiglumis
intro: Agrostis inaequiglumis, also known as the red fescue, is a type of grass found in various parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Agrostis inaequiglumis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
